about.heroSubtitle: From a small family kitchen in Barnagar to a million dining tables — this is the journey of Nidhi Masala, ground one tradition at a time.
about.beginTitle: A recipe passed down, never written down
about.beginP1: It started with a simple belief — that the soul of Indian cooking lives in its spices. What began as masalas hand-ground for family and neighbours slowly became a name people across the region trusted.
about.beginP2: Through every season we held on to one promise: authenticity from farm to kitchen, with nothing artificial in between.

timeline.title: A humble beginning
timeline.text: Nidhi Grah Udyog began in a small family kitchen in Barnagar, hand-grinding spices the way grandmothers always had.

timeline.title: Growing roots
timeline.text: Word of our aroma spread across Ujjain. We partnered directly with local farmers to source the finest harvest.

timeline.title: From kitchen to industry
timeline.text: We modernised our processing while fiercely protecting the traditional recipes that made us who we are.

timeline.title: In a million kitchens
timeline.text: Over a million families trust Nidhi Masala to bring authentic flavour to their everyday meals.

process.title: Sourced from farms
process.text: Hand-picked harvest, straight from trusted local growers.

process.title: Slow-roasted
process.text: Roasted in small batches to lock in oils and aroma.

process.title: Stone-ground
process.text: Ground fine to preserve every note of natural flavour.

process.title: Sealed fresh
process.text: Packed airtight so the first pinch tastes like the last.

values.title: Quality First
